title: mallotus spinifructus
intro: Mallotus spinifructus, also known as Mu Tong, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mallotus spinifructus include relieving respiratory symptoms, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Mallotus spinifructus is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, as well as being used in capsule or tablet form, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
